faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Sealed beneath castle; spreads corruption through kingdom stages

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Betrayal; false heroism revealed as sorcerer
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Boss enemy; former ally turned enemy

Castle, kingdom terrain; progressive corruption visible across 7 stages

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Castle and kingdom in early stages; relatively stable environment
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Enemies appear organized by Gyra's followers; manageable threat level

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Progressive environmental degradation across stages; darker theming in later levels
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Enemy intensity increases; Gyra's influence manifests in stage design and enemy patterns

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Player travels through kingdom stages; visual journey through corrupted territories
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Autoscroll mechanic represents forced progression through hostile world; stage selection mirrors player agency in choosing confrontation order

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Seven weapon types (elemental magic) available; visual distinction in attack graphics
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player weapon selection reflects tactical choice against different enemy types; magic theme reinforces fantasy world-state

environmental_storytelling.example: Stages progress from kingdom areas toward confrontation with Gyra's power; visual environment reflects narrative corruption
Seven elemental magic types correspond to stage themes; each stage visually represents different magical domain
Castle of Lorelei is narrative epicenter; stages represent journey through kingdom to reach castle and confront Roki
Enemies visually represent Gyra's followers and corrupted forces; distinct enemy sprite designs communicate allegiance and threat type

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Autoscroll upward through stages; can attack up or down; selects elemental weapons; progresses through chosen stage order
Attack in patterns; increase in intensity across stages; spawn from environmental locations; boss encounters at stage ends
Final confrontation enemy; represents ultimate threat; stage 7 culmination
Manifests through minions and corrupted environments; influence grows visually across stage progression; represents systemic world threat

notes: Elemental Master communicates world-state primarily through stage progression and environmental theming rather than dynamic real-time changes. The autoscroll mechanic reinforces the narrative of Laden's forced quest through corrupted kingdom. Elemental magic system (7 types) serves dual function: mechanical gameplay variation and world-building (magic is primary communication system in fantasy kingdom). Limited sources available; extraction based on plot summary and gameplay mechanics from Wikipedia. Visual communication relies on 1990 Genesis hardware constraints; subtle environmental progression indicates corruption spreading.
